languages.text: "Подать была отправлена в должном объеме двадцать планетарных оборотов назад. Иными словами, точно в срок, губернатор Вьятт". {n}В сухих словах проктора нет и намека на одобрение.{/n} "Так что я прибыл не поэтому".
"You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."
languages.original_text: "Вы всегда отправляете подать в должном объеме и в срок, губернатор Вьятт". {n}В сухих словах проктора нет и намека на одобрение.{/n} "Так что я прибыл не поэтому".

traits.locale_text: "You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."
"You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."

"You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."

languages.text: “你的什一税始终都是按时按额缴纳的，维亚特总督。”{n}索罗蒙干巴巴地开了口，语气中并没有任何赞许的意味。{/n}“我来这里是为了别的事情。”
languages.original_text: "You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."

traits.locale_text: “你的什一税始终都是按时按额缴纳的，维亚特总督。”{n}索罗蒙干巴巴地开了口，语气中并没有任何赞许的意味。{/n}“我来这里是为了别的事情。”

languages.text: «Siempre envía su tributo al completo y dentro del plazo, gobernadora Vyatt». {n}No hay ningún rastro de aprobación en las palabras secas del Procurador.{/n} «Estoy aquí por otros asuntos».
languages.original_text: "You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."

traits.locale_text: «Siempre envía su tributo al completo y dentro del plazo, gobernadora Vyatt». {n}No hay ningún rastro de aprobación en las palabras secas del Procurador.{/n} «Estoy aquí por otros asuntos».

languages.text: « Vous nous envoyez toujours la dîme en temps et en heure, gouverneure Vyatt, {n}déclare le proctor d'un ton ne laissant pas transparaître la moindre approbation.{/n} Je suis ici pour une autre raison. »
languages.original_text: "You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."

traits.locale_text: « Vous nous envoyez toujours la dîme en temps et en heure, gouverneure Vyatt, {n}déclare le proctor d'un ton ne laissant pas transparaître la moindre approbation.{/n} Je suis ici pour une autre raison. »

languages.text: 「ビャット総督、租税はいつも全額かつ期限内に送られているな」{n}代理人の乾いた言葉には承認の色はなかった。{/n}「俺は別件で来ている」
languages.original_text: "You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."

traits.locale_text: 「ビャット総督、租税はいつも全額かつ期限内に送られているな」{n}代理人の乾いた言葉には承認の色はなかった。{/n}「俺は別件で来ている」

languages.text: "Aşarınızı hep eksiksiz ve tam zamanında gönderirsiniz Vali Vyatt." {n}Üsteğmenin duygusuz sözlerinde hiçbir onaylama belirtisi hissedilmiyor.{/n} "Buraya başka bir iş için geldim."
languages.original_text: "You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."

traits.locale_text: "Aşarınızı hep eksiksiz ve tam zamanında gönderirsiniz Vali Vyatt." {n}Üsteğmenin duygusuz sözlerinde hiçbir onaylama belirtisi yok.{/n} "Buraya başka bir iş için geldim."

languages.text: "Ihr sendet den Tribut stets vollständig und rechtzeitig, Gouverneurin Vyatt." {n}In den trockenen Worten des Proktors liegt keinerlei Anerkennung.{/n} "Ich bin wegen einer anderen Angelegenheit hier."
languages.original_text: "You always send the tribute in full and in due time, Governor Vyatt." {n}There is no indication of approval in the Proctor's dry words.{/n} "I am here on other business."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr sendet den Tribut stets vollständig und rechtzeitig, Gouverneurin Vyatt." {n}In den trockenen Worten des Proktors liegt keinerlei Anerkennung.{/n} "Ich bin wegen einer anderen Angelegenheit hier."
